info.title: sform
info.description: Command-line interface for managing and control 2S platform.

commands.name: account
commands.description: Manage your account and access to 2S platform services.

commands.name: register
commands.description: Register new account with 2S platform.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Set default project and view of the CLI toolkit.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: A project key to set as default.

options.name: --viewName
options.description: A view name to set as default.

commands.name: points
commands.description: Get and manage access points.

commands.name: get
commands.description: Get an access point with list of users and role. You need to be administrator or owner.

options.name: --pointKey
options.description: An access point key to get.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new project (access point).

commands.name: grant
commands.description: Grant access to point to another user.

options.name: --point
options.description: A point key to which the access is granted.

options.name: --role
options.description: A role which is granted, can be one of the values: Reader, Contributor, Administrator, or Owner.

arguments.name: AccountId
arguments.description: The target account ID to whom the permissions are granted. The account ID can be retrieved by 'sform account' command.

commands.name: revoke
commands.description: Revoke access to point to another user.

options.name: --point
options.description: A point key to which the access is revoked.

options.name: --role
options.description: A role which is revoked, can be one of the values: Reader, Contributor, Administrator, or Owner. If not specified all roles will be revoked.

arguments.name: AccountId
arguments.description: The target account key to whom the permissions are revoked.

commands.name: machine
commands.description: Get and manage machine access to 2S platform.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create new machine access.

options.name: --annotation
options.description: An annotation key where the access is restricted.

options.name: --write
options.description: Scope will be read and write.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Reset secret for an machine access.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

arguments.name: MachineId
arguments.description: An id of an machine access.

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a machine access.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

arguments.name: MachineId
arguments.description: An id of an machine access.

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Logout out from this CLI instance.

commands.name: storyteller
commands.description: Retrieve the story of your platform (manage annotations).

options.name: --usages
options.description: Query usages, can be combined with responsibilities or subjects.

options.name: --executions
options.description: Query executions, can be combined with responsibilities, subjects, or contexts.

options.name: --descendants
options.description: Retrieve descendants of a specific annotation.

options.name: --tree
options.description: Show results as tree based by subjects.

options.name: --tree-root
options.description: An annotation type to render the tree based on.

options.name: --continuation-token
options.description: The continuation token for next results page.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

commands.name: get
commands.description: Retrieve a specific annotation.

options.name: --export
options.description: Specify a file where the retrieved configuration will be saved.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

commands.name: set
commands.description: Create or update an annotation.

options.name: --import
options.description: Specify a file from where the annotation(s) will be imported.

options.name: --custom-properties
options.description: Specify custom properties to be set on the configuration.

options.name: --labels
options.description: Specify labels to be set on the configuration.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete an annotation and its descendants.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

commands.name: config
commands.description: Get and manage configuration in context of an annotation.

options.name: --export
options.description: Specify a file where the retrieved configuration will be saved.

options.name: --resolved
options.description: Retrieve resolved configuration, administrator permission is needed.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

arguments.name: AnnotationKey
arguments.description: An annotation key to get the configuration for.

commands.name: set
commands.description: Create or update a configuration.

options.name: --resolved
options.description: Retrieve resolved configuration, administrator permission is needed.

options.name: --import
options.description: Specify a file from where the configuration(s) will be imported.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Specify inline properties to be set on the configuration.

options.name: --custom-properties
options.description: Specify custom properties to be set on the configuration.

options.name: --labels
options.description: Specify labels to be set on the configuration.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

arguments.name: AnnotationKey
arguments.description: An annotation key to set the configuration for.

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete a configuration.

options.name: --projectKey
options.description: Explicitly targeted organization and project. Use full key in format: <organizationName>.<projectName>

arguments.name: AnnotationKey
arguments.description: An annotation key to delete the configuration for.

commands.name: supervisor
commands.description: Supervise and over-watch your platform.

commands.name: scheduler
commands.description: Manage time based jobs / units.

commands.name: assist
commands.description: Get assistance with the usage of 2S platform.

commands.name: key
commands.description: Manage your account and access to 2S platform services.
